title: carduncellus mareoticus
intro: Carduncellus mareoticus, also known as Mareotic thistle, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family, native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carduncellus mareoticus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
